extracted.full_content:
You'll no longer see this post in your feed.

We appreciate you letting us know

Thank you for your report

Hiring _ #Generative AI (#GenAI) & #Intelligent Agent Consultant _ New York, NY

Notes:
•	This is a long-term contract role.
•	Day one onsite with hybrid.
•	Preferred local candidates only who can come for in-person interview
 
Skills required:
•	7–15 years proven experience in #AI/ML engineering, architecting and delivering real-world products or platforms.
•	Deep, practical expertise with #LLMs, #GenAI frameworks (#OpenAI, #LangChain, etc.), and agent development.
•	Strong programming skills (e.g., #Python) and architectural experience with distributed, scalable systems.
•	Hands-on experience designing and developing AI/ML models, GenAI applications in production environments (cloud/on-premise).
•	Experience with evaluation, observability/monitoring of GenAI solutions.
•	Strong understanding of microservices, API design, CI/CD, containerization, and MLOps practices.
•	Excellent communication skills and ability to drive technical vision collaboratively.
•	Track record of delivering high-quality AI products with scalability, maintainability, and observability in mind.
•	Familiarity with Agile development and DevOps concepts

Nice to have:
•	Experience with DevOps and CI/CD in ML workflows is a plus.
•	Experience in agentic process automation or AI copilots

If you are interested and suitable to this role, please send your updated resume to skumar@alltechconsultinginc.com

Thanks.,
Senthil Kumar | 609-297-8907 | skumar@alltechconsultinginc.com
